en.eNote: Intake logged 1/7 days (Jun 12: 1,715). Non-logged days assume the 2,000 kcal plan intake.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories. Non-logged days assume 2,000 kcal. Avg balance ≈ −964 kcal/day.
en.wNote: Bridge available only for days with logged meals (Jun 12). Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1: Thursday's squats: 8.1 t, 14 sets, 162 reps — down from Tuesday's hack-squat 13.2 t and 3 sets below your 17-set template. Deliberate deload or cut short? Flag for Ivan either way.
en.i2: Avg HR on lifting days: 116 → 111 → 109 across the week while loads stayed heavy — consistent with improving work capacity. Saturday ran avg 116 / max 165.
en.i3: Friday was your first complete off-day after an 8-day streak — the circuit breaker before Saturday's session. RHR fell to a week-low 52 by Saturday.
en.i4: Max (139–165), avg (109–132) and RHR (52–58) never converge — the gap between RHR and session avg is your aerobic headroom, stable at ~55–75 bpm.
en.rec: Saturday strength done (avg 116 / max 165), RHR back to a week-low 52 — fully recovered after Friday's rest. Hevy hasn't synced Saturday's lift yet, so its volume and set-peaks fill in on the next refresh. Sunday: rest, or Z2 hike/ride only if RHR stays off the 58 trigger.

hr.eNote: Unos zabilježen 1/7 dana (12.6.: 1.715). Dani bez zapisa pretpostavljaju planski unos 2.000 kcal.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije. Dani bez zapisa pretpostavljaju 2.000 kcal. Prosj. bilanca ≈ −964 kcal/dan.
hr.wNote: Most dostupan samo za dane sa zabilježenim obrocima (12.6.). Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1: Četvrtak squat: 8,1 t, 14 serija, 162 ponavljanja — manje od utorkovih 13,2 t (hack) i 3 serije ispod predloška od 17. Namjerni deload ili skraćeno? Javi Ivanu u oba slučaja.
hr.i2: Prosj. puls na danima dizanja: 116 → 111 → 109 kroz tjedan uz teška opterećenja — u skladu s rastućim radnim kapacitetom. Subota prosj. 116 / maks 165.
hr.i3: Petak je bio prvi potpuni slobodan dan nakon niza od 8 — prekidač prije subotnjeg treninga. RHR pao na tjedni minimum 52 do subote.
hr.i4: Maks (139–165), prosjek (109–132) i RHR (52–58) se ne približavaju — razmak RHR-a i prosjeka treninga je aerobna rezerva, stabilno ~55–75 otkucaja.
hr.rec: Subotnji trening odrađen (prosj. 116 / maks 165), RHR natrag na tjedni minimum 52 — potpuno oporavljen nakon petka. Hevy još nije sinkronizirao subotnje dizanje pa se volumen i vrhovi serija popune pri sljedećem osvježavanju. Nedjelja: odmor ili Z2 samo ako RHR ostane ispod okidača 58.
